case_title: OPORTUN INC VS. CORNELIO KU UHU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/28/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "VACANT-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT UHU, CORNELIO KU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED SEP-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UHU, CORNELIO KU
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED SEP-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UHU, CORNELIO KU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UHU, CORNELIO KU $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
